directions_tried.name: Phase 1: Thesis Generation
directions_tried.outcome: Three strong theses: entanglement, becoming, computational. More complementary than contradictory.

directions_tried.name: Phase 2: Adversarial Stress-Testing
directions_tried.outcome: Entanglement thesis wounded but viable. Synthesis tested; QRF hybrid recommended.

directions_tried.name: Phase 3: Synthesis and Refinement
directions_tried.outcome: Synthesis built, stress-tested (four modifications), core rigorized, final articulation written. E010 partial (crash).

explorations_completed.key_finding: Four programs converge on time as entanglement structure.
Wounded but viable. Static/dynamic incoherence found.
Two wounds: circularity, factorization. QRF hybrid recommended.
Three-layer synthesis articulated with QRF + LBB + phenomenology.
Core survives. Four mandatory modifications. Factorization most serious.
LBB is engine not fuel. CI grounds flow. ML illuminates but doesn't derive.
Complete interpretation written for thoughtful reader.
